params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: F5 step 3-F: atomic WS write fix. #668 verdict: JSON envelope TRUNCATED mid-string ('Unexpected end of input'). Root cause identified: visible_tls_session.cpp:636 calls on_disconnected(socket) IMMEDIATELY after write_visible_data when _block_response_is_http2=0 — TCP-level disconnect races SSL flush, drops trailing bytes. Fix: switch ai_prompt_filter.cpp:1041 to _ai_prompt_block_is_http2=2 (keep-alive), with stream_id=0 the RST_STREAM block is skipped, so behavior = write_visible_data + no on_disconnected. The bundled close frame (0x88 02 03 E8) inside the buffer is the WS-level disconnect. Expectation: client now receives FULL JSON envelope, parses {command:'neo_error',message:'...'} via onmessage routing, renders Korean warning OR raises specific routing error in console (which would tell us next envelope axis if 'neo_error' isn't recognized).

devtools_check_instructions: 4. Engine inject: production [APF:ws_inject] log mode=keep_alive (text+close, no tcp_disc)
5. UI: 채팅 영역에 한글 차단 메시지 visible (chat bubble OR error display)
6. Regression: real LLM PII 분석 없어야 함
7. Console errors: 'Unexpected end of input' 가 사라졌는지 확인. 만약 'Unexpected token' 또는 다른 에러면 envelope routing 문제 (다음 axis: {command:'system_message'} 또는 {type:'error'})
8. WS frames: outbound + inbound — server→client text frame full JSON 도달 여부 확인
9. PARTIAL 인 경우: console 에 routing 관련 hint 가 있으면 (예: 'unknown command neo_error') 보고

notes: F5 step 3-F atomic write fix — is_http2=2 keep-alive mode, skip on_disconnected race
